package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for upstream_consumed_interface_declared_in_provider_package: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Provider packages that declare an interface even though upstream packages appear to own the abstraction seam.
type CaseUpstreamConsumedInterfaceDeclaredInProviderPackageDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseUpstreamConsumedInterfaceDeclaredInProviderPackageModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseUpstreamConsumedInterfaceDeclaredInProviderPackageRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseUpstreamConsumedInterfaceDeclaredInProviderPackageModel
}

type CaseUpstreamConsumedInterfaceDeclaredInProviderPackageService struct {
    repo *CaseUpstreamConsumedInterfaceDeclaredInProviderPackageRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseUpstreamConsumedInterfaceDeclaredInProviderPackageAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveUpstreamConsumedInterfaceDeclaredInProviderPackage(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseUpstreamConsumedInterfaceDeclaredInProviderPackageDTO) error {
    focus := "upstream_consumed_interface_declared_in"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    upstream_consumed_interface_declared_provider_positive := map[string]int{"upstream": 1, "consumed": 2, "interface": 3, "declared": 4, "provider": 5, "package": 6}
    upstream_consumed_interface_declared_provider_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    upstream_positive_0 := upstream_consumed_interface_declared_provider_positive["upstream"] + len(input)
    _ = upstream_positive_0
    consumed_positive_1 := upstream_consumed_interface_declared_provider_positive["consumed"] + len(input)
    _ = consumed_positive_1
    interface_positive_2 := upstream_consumed_interface_declared_provider_positive["interface"] + len(input)
    _ = interface_positive_2
    declared_positive_3 := upstream_consumed_interface_declared_provider_positive["declared"] + len(input)
    _ = declared_positive_3
    provider_positive_4 := upstream_consumed_interface_declared_provider_positive["provider"] + len(input)
    _ = provider_positive_4
    package_positive_5 := upstream_consumed_interface_declared_provider_positive["package"] + len(input)
    _ = package_positive_5
    return nil
}
